title: Dorigins
description: A fabric mod that adds additional origins to the origins mod.
body:
![Dorigins](https://i.imgur.com/mQJa12W.png) ![Overview](https://i.imgur.com/kSLO2W4.png)

Dorigins is a collection of 8 new custom origins(including an evolution to an origin), custom made by me, in order to fully enhance the possibilities of the origins mod. While the current origins mod only has 9 basic origins, the custom origins included in dorigins expand the possibilities of the origins concepts, using many custom cool powers and abilities. 

This mod adds quite a few origin and is planned to add way more, some included origins are:

  • The puffborne - A pufferfish-human hybrid 
  • The enchanter - A living enchanting table, with the ability to enchant any held item if you have the lapis and levels required.
  • The cardboard warrior - A fierce fighter made of.. cardboard, enhanced fighter with abilities to show this.

Origins to come:

  • Axolotl - Descendent of the God 'Xolotl', you used to be able to morph freely between axolotl and god, you're now stuck in your axolotl form.
  • Yeti - Commonly referred to as 'The abominable Snowman', the yeti is an ancient beast standing at over 15 feet tall built to survive the cold.
  • Time God - An ancient mythological being with the power to freeze crop growth, animal movement and more.

Issues? Dm me!

[ ![Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08507076ca529ab439b860c019d1941d7b768604.png)](https://dorigins.carrd.co/) [![Requires Fabric API](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/d8fbfea84f75cf19ed1911f3c30fd98adc36c13df27bfda548f13bfc92124ddb/68747470733a2f2f692e696d6775722e636f6d2f486162565a4a522e706e67)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)[![Requires Pehkui](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/513ccaa4817b3a9b29d0de75287e4c1d65e690b8d5f4cca7a3aab0591d11a494/68747470733a2f2f63646e2e646973636f72646170702e636f6d2f6174746163686d656e74732f3734373230303039373031353536323235302f3834303033393832353637383636333734312f7065686b75695f62616467652e706e67)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pehkui)[![Requires Origins](https://imgur.com/D71cgFC.png)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins)
